requirements.summary: Redeploy the full AI Image Studio frontend in its current state, ensuring the React frontend with image generation form, display, and prompt history are all fully functional
acceptanceCriteria: The app loads without errors in the browser
The image generation form renders correctly with all fields (art style, emotion, lighting, pose, etc.)
The backend responds to image generation requests
Prompt history displays previously generated prompts
No 'Not Found' or deployment errors appear

file_operations.description: Verify the HTML entry point is correctly configured with the #root mount point and main.tsx module reference to ensure the React app loads properly
Verify the React app entry point correctly wraps App with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, ensuring all context providers are properly initialized for the redeploy
Verify the root component correctly wires together ImageGenerationForm, ImageDisplay, and PromptHistory components with proper state management using useGenerateImage and useSendQueries hooks
Verify the sticky header displays the AI Image Studio logo, title with gradient styling, and 'Powered by Hugging Face' subtitle correctly
Verify the form component renders all image generation parameters (art style, emotion, lighting, pose, etc.) with preset save/load functionality and API token dialog working correctly
Verify the image display component correctly shows generated images, loading spinner, or user-friendly error messages mapped from backend error codes (HF_EMPTY_RESPONSE, 401, 503) with retry hints
Verify the collapsible prompt history card fetches and displays generation history sorted by timestamp with copy-to-clipboard functionality working correctly
Verify the footer displays copyright year and caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking parameters correctly
Verify the backend actor hook correctly creates and caches the ICP backend actor using Internet Identity and invalidates dependent queries on actor changes
Verify the Internet Identity provider and hook correctly manage DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state across the app
Verify React Query hooks for image generation, prompt history, and presets work correctly with response-parsing utilities that normalize backend and Hugging Face API errors
Verify the global CSS file preserves the charcoal+amber studio theme with dark/light mode CSS custom properties and fade/slide-in keyframe animations as required by project constraints
Verify Tailwind configuration extends the theme with oklch-based design tokens, custom fonts (Inter, JetBrains Mono), glow shadows, and accordion animations correctly
Verify emotion types and intensity levels with associated prompt keywords are correctly defined and the helper function builds emotion prompt strings properly
Verify negative prompt presets (Low Quality, Blur & Noise, etc.) are correctly defined as string constants with ordered key exports
